caption: A group of practitioners performs a traditional martial arts demonstration in a large, indoor venue with a tiered ceiling and elaborate chandeliers. In the center, a man wearing a bright yellow traditional suit leads the performance, wielding a long staff topped with a red tassel. He moves dynamically, transitioning from a high strike to a lower, defensive stance. Around him, other participants in blue traditional suits also hold staffs, coordinating their movements across the blue carpeted floor. In the background, an audience sits at tables, watching the display. As the sequence progresses, the man in yellow swings his staff in wide arcs, while the participants in blue shift their positions, with one individual in a blue shirt and jeans moving across the background. The scene remains focused on the fluid, athletic motions of the staff techniques within the formal hall.
